zh.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough於大約1490年出生在英國英格蘭艾可維可。他於1507年與Anna Dorthea Cardinale在英國素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1604年3月19日在他的家鄉享年115歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可維可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough于大约1490年出生在英国英格兰艾可維可。他于1507年与Anna Dorthea Cardinale在英国素福爾可易亞斯特 波爾特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1604年3月19日在他的家乡享年115岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可維可。

nameMeanings.name: Burrough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough was born about 1490, in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He married Anna Dorthea Cardinale in 1507, in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 19 March 1604, in his hometown, at the age of 115, and was buried in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough est né environ 1490, à Wix, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Anna Dorthea Cardinale en 1507, à East Bergholt, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1604, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 115 ans, et a été enterré à Wix, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough wurde um 1490 in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1507 in East Bergholt, Suffolk, England Anna Dorthea Cardinale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 19. März 1604 im Alter von 115 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wix, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough è nato il circa 1490 nel Wix, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Anna Dorthea Cardinale nel 1507, nel East Bergholt, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 19 marzo 1604, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 115 anni, e fu sepolto a Wix, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christopher Burroughは約1490年にイギリスイギリスエセックスウィックスで生まれた。1507年にイギリススフォルクエアスト バーグホルトでAnna Dorthea Cardinaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1604年3月19日に故郷で115歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスウィックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough(은)는 대략 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위스에서 태어났다. 그는 1507년 영국 수폴크 이스트 버고트에서 Anna Dorthea Cardinale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1604년 3월 19일 그의 고향에서 115세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 위스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough nasceu aproximadamente 1490, em Wix, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Anna Dorthea Cardinale em 1507, em East Bergholt, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1604, em sua cidade natal, com 115 anos, e foi sepultado em Wix, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Christopher Burrough родился около 1490 г. в местности викс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Dorthea Cardinale в 1507 г. в местности эаст бирголт, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 19 марта 1604 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 115 лет и был похоронен в местности викс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
